title: Smoky Pull Egyptian Cheese Robata-Grilled Sandwich
description: A delicious weeknight Egyptian dish featuring smoky cheese and a sweet hint of Dutch stroop, all grilled to perfection on a robata grill. Perfect for a quick and satisfying lunch or dinner.
instructions: Brush the sourdough bread slices with a small amount of robata-grill oil on both sides.
Grill the bread slices for 2-3 minutes per side, or until lightly toasted.
Meanwhile, mix the mozzarella cheese with smoked paprika and a pinch of salt and pepper.
Once the bread is toasted, top one slice with a mixture of mozzarella cheese and Dutch stroop.
Place the second slice of bread on top of the cheese mixture, creating a sandwich.
Grill the sandwich for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the bread is crispy.
Remove the sandwich from the grill and let it cool for a minute or two before slicing.
Slice the sandwich in half and serve immediately.
